headline: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Announces Opening of Glasgow Center to Offer Technology-led BPO services
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 14, the company announced the opening of the Glasgow center to offer technology-led BPO services. This further bolsters its international expansion strategy that is aligned with global client demand. The Glasgow hub happens to […]

headline: Broadridge Kyndryl Partnership Targets Quantum Safe Core And AI Operations
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has extended its technology partnership with Kyndryl to modernize its core platforms. The collaboration focuses on quantum-safe security, AI-enabled operations, and improved scalability and resiliency. This development builds on Broadridge's broader digitization efforts and targets its underlying infrastructure rather than just front-end tools. Broadridge Financial Solutions, trading at $153.72, has seen mixed share performance, with the stock up...
